axiom_overrides.note: All unsafe blocks must have SAFETY comments — non-negotiable for this MCP server.
We are aware of `IlluError::Other(String)` saturation in the four new tools shipped in PR #95; tracked in decision_2026_04_27_error_categories and addressed in the follow-up PR #96.

local_axioms.rule_summary: rusqlite::Connection is !Sync, so the project always wraps Database in Arc<Mutex<_>> when sharing across async tasks.
local_axioms.prompt_injection: MANDATORY RULE: Never hold a bare Database in a tokio task. Always go through Arc<Mutex<Database>>; the lock is briefly acquired around each query.
local_axioms.anti_pattern: let db = Database::open(...)?; tokio::spawn(async move { db.query(...) });
local_axioms.good_pattern: let db = Arc::new(Mutex::new(Database::open(...)?)); let db_clone = db.clone(); tokio::spawn(async move { let guard = db_clone.lock().await; guard.query(...) });
